mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_history ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '主键', conversation_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '会话ID', user_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '用户ID', message_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL COMMENT '消息类型: USER/ASSISTANT/SYSTEM', content TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT '消息内容', create_time DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='AI聊天历史记录表'
ALTER TABLE chat_history ADD COLUMN user_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '用户ID' AFTER conversation_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_history (conversation_id, user_id, message_type, content, create_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO chat_history (conversation_id, user_id, message_type, content, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.conversationId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.messageType}, #{item.content}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_history SET user_id = #{userId} WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND user_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.conversation_id, c.user_id, c.message_type, c.content, c.create_time FROM chat_history c INNER JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MIN(create_time) AS first_time FROM chat_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY conversation_id ORDER BY first_time DESC ) t ON c.conversation_id = t.conversation_id AND c.create_time = t.first_time
